data.title: Faculty Launches Frontier Plug-in Marketplace, Accelerating How Organisations Build and Scale Decision Intelligence
data.description: In a recent update, Frontier has introduced new modular plug-ins aimed at enhancing platform capabilities and improving integration with current enterprise tools. This release, unveiled in London on April 23, 2026, by Faculty, the creator of the Decision Intelligence platform Faculty Frontier™, is set to empower technical teams with expanded functionality. These advancements are poised to streamline operations and bolster collaboration between various systems.

data.title: MongoDB Announces €74M Ireland Expansion, 200 Jobs, and New Cork Office
data.description: A significant investment of €74 million is being made to enhance MongoDB's operations in Ireland, focusing on expanding engineering and AI development. This move is set to bring about the creation of approximately 200 new jobs by 2027. This expansion will see the Irish workforce grow by over 50%, reaching a total of 500+ employees. With locations in Dublin for the International Headquarters and a new office in Cork, this initiative aims to support over 65,200 customers in transitioning their AI projects from experimental phases to...

data.title: ezCheckPrinting and Virtual Printer Helps QB Clients Cut Costs Amid Rising Business Expenses
data.description: With rising inflation and operational expenses, ezCheckPrinting and Virtual Printer offer a dependable, cost-effective method for professional check printing. The prices will remain unchanged for 2026 amidst these challenges. The company, based in REDMOND, Wash., announced this decision on April 23, 2026. This solution provides stability and affordability for businesses at a time when costs are increasing.

data.title: Attackers Favor Widely Trusted Platforms While Adapting to Detection Methods, VIPRE's Q1 2026 Email Threat Trends Report Reveals
data.description: In London, as of April 23, 2026, VIPRE Security Group, a renowned cybersecurity, privacy, and data protection company, has reported a significant increase in commercial spam, link-based malspam, and the utilization of QR code-embedded PDFs. Their latest Q1 2026 Email Threat Trends Report reveals a spike in these malicious activities. The report showcases escalating numbers indicating a concerning trend in online security threats.

data.title: Getac Redefines Rugged Mobility with Launch of G140 Copilot+ PC, Powered by AMD Technology
data.description: Getac recently introduced the G140 tablet, combining cutting-edge AI technology with MIL-STD fully rugged defense in a portable and lightweight build. This marks Getac's inaugural release of an AMD-powered fully rugged tablet, designed as a Copilot+ PC. The G140 targets public safety sectors and emphasizes durability and high-performance computing capabilities on-the-go.

data.title: Aokah Launches Explorer and Builder: The First AI-Powered Platform to Take Enterprises from GCC Strategy to Execution
data.description: Three major companies in the consumer goods, diversified manufacturing, and logistics sectors have begun utilizing Explorer and Builder tools to expedite their decision-making processes and establish Global Customer Centers with increased certainty in execution. This significant development was reported in New York on April 23, 2026.

data.title: REALM Global Network Brings Together Top Real Estate Advisors and Futurists to Chart the Future of Luxury Real Estate
data.description: Last week, 230 top luxury real estate advisors from around the world came together in Scottsdale, Arizona for the 2026 REALM Global Collective event. This gathering marked a significant moment in the future of luxury real estate, with experts convening deliberately to discuss industry trends and insights.

data.title: AGHATI SWEETS RECOGNISED FOR EXCELLENCE IN PREMIUM CONFECTIONERY CRAFTSMANSHIP AT THE GLOBAL BRAND AWARDS 2026
data.description: In London on April 23, 2026, Aghati Sweets was recognized with the prestigious 'Excellence in Premium Confectionery Craftsmanship – Middle East, 2026' award at the Global Brand Awards hosted by Global Brands Magazine. This accolade celebrates the exceptional work of organizations in various sectors worldwide.

data.title: Mobile Vikings subscriptions hub powered by the Digital Vending Machine® from Bango
data.description: In Cambridge, UK on April 23, 2026, Bango, a key player in subscription bundling (AIM: BGO), revealed that Mobile Vikings, a major MVNO in Belgium under Proximus Group, has employed Bango's Digital Vending Machine® (DVM™) for its subscriptions hub. Mobile Vikings has introduced its first subscription through this platform, offering a prominent streaming service, and intends to unveil more digital subscriptions throughout 2026.

data.title: VEON 2025 Integrated Annual Report: Record Digital Growth, Sovereign AI and Kyivstar Listing Define a Transformative Year
data.description: On April 23, 2026, VEON Ltd. revealed its 2025 Integrated Annual Report (IAR 2025), marking a significant year for the company in terms of digital and financial achievements. The report highlights VEON's efforts in enhancing its Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) program. VEON, listed on Nasdaq as VEON, is a prominent global digital operator with a focus on improving its overall performance.

data.title: Global Custom T-Shirt Printing Market Forecast 2026-2036: USA, UK & South Korea Drive Growth Led by Printful, Custom Ink | Future Market Insights
data.description: In the recent market analysis conducted by Future Market Insights, it has been reported that the global custom t-shirt printing market is on track for significant growth. This surge is primarily propelled by a growing preference for personalized clothing, a higher uptake of print-on-demand systems, and various other factors. The expansion of this market signifies a promising opportunity for businesses involved in custom t-shirt printing. The specifics of the market's size and potential revenues were not disclosed in the provided information, but it outlines a positive outlook for the industry in the coming years.

data.title: MacGregor to supply deck machinery for ultra-large cable-laying vessels
data.description: Press Release - MacGregor Secured Contract to Provide Deck Machinery for Ultra-Large Cable-Laying VesselsOn April 23, 2026, MacGregor announced that they have been chosen to supply a full range of offshore and merchant deck machinery for ultra-large cable-laying vessels. The vessels, which will be built at Tersan Shipyard, will benefit from MacGregor's comprehensive package of equipment. This decision highlights MacGregor's expertise and reputation in the maritime industry.
